title: Hedwig: Dynamic Autonomy for Coding Agents Under Local Oversight
authors: Tanjal Shukla, K. J. Kevin Feng, Leijie Wang, Mohammad Rostami, Amy X. Zhang
abstract: Despite coding agents' advances in handling increasingly complex tasks, their continued tendency to introduce unintended edits, subtle bugs, and scope drift that slip past code review means developers must still decide how much autonomy to grant them. However, existing approaches for setting an agent's level of autonomy, such as static permission settings or instruction files, cannot account for how developers' preferences for agent autonomy can shift across tasks and over time. We conducted a formative survey with 21 software engineers who use coding agents and found that they experience frustration with calibrating autonomy and have evolving preferences for level of oversight. Building on these insights, we present Hedwig, a CLI coding agent that dynamically adjusts its autonomy level based on developer-agent interactions across sessions. Rather than operating on a global, fixed autonomy configuration, Hedwig learns an evolving set of behavioral guidelines from developer decisions and feedback, reducing friction on work for which the agent has earned trust, while tightening oversight when the agent operates outside familiar territory. Hedwig demonstrates the potential of a new paradigm where agents intelligently adapt their level of autonomy based on user trust through active, longitudinal collaboration.
title_zh: Hedwig：本地监督下编程代理的动态自主性
abstract_zh: 尽管编码代理在处理日益复杂任务方面取得了进展，但它们仍倾向于引入意外修改、细微错误和范围偏离，这些往往能逃过代码审查，这意味着开发者仍必须决定授予它们多少自主权。然而，现有的设置代理自主性水平的方法（如静态权限设置或指令文件）无法应对开发者对代理自主性偏好的变化——这种偏好会随任务和时间的推移而改变。我们通过对21名使用编码代理的软件工程师进行初步调查发现，他们在校准自主性方面感到挫败，且对监督水平的偏好会逐渐演变。基于这些洞察，我们提出了Hedwig——一款命令行界面（CLI）编码代理，它能根据开发者与代理在不同会话中的交互动态调整自主性水平。Hedwig并非采用全局固定的自主性配置，而是从开发者的决策和反馈中学习不断演变的行为准则，从而在代理已赢得信任的工作中减少摩擦，同时在代理进入陌生领域时加强监督。Hedwig展示了一种新范式的潜力：通过主动、长期的协作，代理能根据用户信任智能地调整自身自主性水平。

title: Overtrained, Not Misaligned
authors: Joel Schreiber, Ariel Goldstein
abstract: Emergent misalignment (EM), where fine-tuning on a narrow task (like insecure code) causes broad misalignment across unrelated domains, was first demonstrated by Betley et al. (2025). We conduct the most comprehensive EM study to date, reproducing the original GPT-4o finding and expanding to 12 open-source models across 4 families (Llama, Qwen, DeepSeek, GPT-OSS) ranging from 8B to 671B parameters, evaluating over one million model responses with multiple random seeds. We find that EM replicates in GPT-4o but is far from universal: only 2 of 12 open-source models (17%) exhibit consistent EM across seeds, with a significant correlation between model size and EM susceptibility. Through checkpoint-level analysis during fine-tuning, we demonstrate that EM emerges late in training, distinct from and subsequent to near convergence of the primary task, suggesting EM emerges from continued training past task convergence. This yields practical mitigations: early stopping eliminates EM while retaining an average of 93% of task performance, and careful learning rate selection further minimizes risk. Cross-domain validation on medical fine-tuning confirms these patterns generalize: the size-EM correlation strengthens (r = 0.90), and overgeneralization to untruthfulness remains avoidable via early stopping in 67% of cases, though semantically proximate training domains produce less separable misalignment. As LLMs become increasingly integrated into real-world systems, fine-tuning and reinforcement learning remain the primary methods for adapting model behavior. Our findings demonstrate that with proper training practices, EM can be avoided, reframing it from an unforeseen fine-tuning risk to an avoidable training artifact.
title_zh: 过度训练，并非失调
abstract_zh: 涌现性错位（EM）是指在狭窄任务（如生成不安全代码）上进行微调，导致模型在无关领域出现广泛错位的现象，该现象由Betley等人(2025)首次证明。我们开展了迄今为止最全面的EM研究，复现了原始GPT-4o的发现，并将其扩展到4个系列的12个开源模型（Llama、Qwen、DeepSeek、GPT-OSS），参数规模从8B到671B不等，使用多个随机种子评估了超过一百万条模型响应。我们发现EM在GPT-4o中可复现，但远非普遍：12个开源模型中仅有2个（17%）在不同种子上表现出一致的EM，且模型大小与EM易感性之间存在显著相关性。通过微调过程中的检查点级别分析，我们证明了EM在训练后期出现，区别于主要任务接近收敛之后，这表明EM源于任务收敛后的持续训练。这带来了实用的缓解措施：早停可以在保留平均93%任务性能的同时消除EM，而谨慎选择学习率可进一步降低风险。在医学微调上的跨领域验证确认了这些模式的泛化性：大小-EM相关性增强（r=0.90），并且对不真实性的过度泛化在67%的案例中仍可通过早停避免，尽管语义邻近的训练领域会产生更难分离的错位。随着LLM日益集成到现实世界系统中，微调和强化学习仍是调整模型行为的主要方法。我们的发现表明，通过适当的训练实践，EM可以被避免，从而将其从不可预见的微调风险重新定义为可避免的训练伪影。

title: Formalize, Don't Optimize: The Heuristic Trap in LLM-Generated Combinatorial Solvers
authors: Haoyu Wang, Yuliang Song, Tao Li, Zhiwei Deng, Yaqing Wang, Deepak Ramachandran, Eldan Cohen, Dan Roth
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle to solve complex combinatorial problems through direct reasoning, so recent neuro-symbolic systems increasingly use them to synthesize executable solvers. A central design question is how the LLM should represent the solver, and whether it should also attempt to optimize search. We introduce CP-SynC-XL, a benchmark of 100 combinatorial problems (4,577 instances), and evaluate three solver-construction paradigms: native algorithmic search (Python), constraint modeling through a Python solver API (Python + OR-Tools), and declarative constraint modeling (MiniZinc + OR-Tools). We find a consistent representational divergence: Python + OR-Tools attains the highest correctness across LLMs, while MiniZinc + OR-Tools has lower absolute coverage despite using the same OR-Tools back-end. Native Python is the most likely to return a schema-valid solution that fails verification, whereas solver-backed paths preserve higher conditional fidelity. On the heuristic axis, prompting for search optimization yields only small median speed-ups (1.03-1.12x) and a strongly bimodal effect: many instances slow down, and correctness drops sharply on a long tail of problems. A paired code-level audit traces these regressions to a recurring heuristic trap. Under an efficiency-oriented prompt, the LLM may replace complete search with local approximations (Python), inject unverified bounds (Python + OR-Tools), or add redundant declarative machinery that overwhelms or over-constrains the model (MiniZinc + OR-Tools). These findings support a conservative design principle for LLM-generated combinatorial solvers: use the LLM primarily to formalize variables, constraints, and objectives for verified solvers, and separately check any LLM-authored search optimization before use.
title_zh: 形式化，而非优化：LLM生成的组合求解器中的启发式陷阱
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）在通过直接推理解决复杂组合问题时存在困难，因此近年来神经符号系统越来越多地利用它们来合成可执行的求解器。一个核心设计问题是：LLM应如何表示求解器，以及是否应同时尝试优化搜索过程。我们提出了CP-SynC-XL，一个包含100个组合问题（共4,577个实例）的基准测试，并评估了三种求解器构建范式：原生算法搜索（Python）、通过Python求解器API进行的约束建模（Python + OR-Tools）以及声明式约束建模（MiniZinc + OR-Tools）。我们发现存在一致的表示差异：Python + OR-Tools在所有LLM中获得了最高的正确率，而MiniZinc + OR-Tools虽然使用相同的OR-Tools后端，但绝对覆盖率较低。原生Python最有可能返回一个模式有效但验证失败的解决方案，而基于求解器的路径则保持了更高的条件保真度。在启发式优化方面，提示搜索优化仅带来中位数速度的小幅提升（1.03-1.12倍），且呈现强烈的双峰效应：许多实例速度下降，同时在一长尾问题上正确率急剧下降。通过配对代码级别的审计，我们将这些退化现象追溯到一个反复出现的启发式陷阱。在效率导向的提示下，LLM可能用局部近似替代完整搜索（Python）、注入未经验证的边界（Python + OR-Tools），或添加冗余的声明式机制，使模型过载或过度约束（MiniZinc + OR-Tools）。这些发现支持LLM生成的组合求解器应采用保守设计原则：主要利用LLM为已验证的求解器形式化变量、约束和目标，并对LLM撰写的任何搜索优化在使用前进行单独检查。

title: Classifier Context Rot: Monitor Performance Degrades with Context Length
authors: Sam Martin, Fabien Roger
abstract: Monitoring coding agents for dangerous behavior using language models requires classifying transcripts that often exceed 500K tokens, but prior agent monitoring benchmarks rarely contain transcripts longer than 100K tokens. We show that when used as classifiers, current frontier models fail to notice dangerous actions more often in longer transcripts. In particular, on a dataset that requires identifying when a coding agent takes a subtly dangerous action, Opus 4.6, GPT 5.4, and Gemini 3.1 miss these actions $2\times$ to $30\times$ more often when they occur after 800K tokens of benign activity than when they occur on their own. We also show that these weaknesses can be partially mitigated with prompting techniques such as periodic reminders throughout the transcript and may be mitigated further with better post-training. Monitor evaluations that do not consider long-context degradation are likely overestimating monitor performance.
title_zh: 分类器上下文衰减：监控性能随上下文长度降低
abstract_zh: 使用语言模型监控编码代理的危险行为需要对通常超过50万token的转录进行分类，但先前的代理监控基准很少包含超过10万token的转录。我们表明，当用作分类器时，当前的先进模型在较长的转录中更常未能注意到危险行为。特别地，在一个需要识别编码代理何时采取微妙危险行为的数据集上，Opus 4.6、GPT 5.4和Gemini 3.1在80万token的良性活动后出现这些行为时，遗漏的概率是它们单独出现时的2倍到30倍。我们还表明，这些弱点可以通过提示技术部分缓解，例如在整个转录中定期提醒，并且通过更好的后期训练可能进一步缓解。不考虑长上下文退化的监控评估可能高估了监控性能。

title: Drop the Act: Probe-Filtered RL for Faithful Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
authors: Swapnil Parekh
abstract: Reasoning models post-hoc rationalize answers they have already committed to internally, producing chains of *reasoning theater*: deliberative-looking steps that contribute nothing to correctness. This wastes inference tokens, pollutes interpretability, and obscures what the model actually computed. We introduce **ProFIL** (**Pro**be-**Fil**tered Reinforcement Learning) to *reduce theater, increase chain-of-thought faithfulness, and shrink chain length* in a single, drop-in extension to Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). A multi-head attention probe is trained *once* on the *frozen* base model to detect post-commitment steps from internal activations alone; during GRPO, rollouts whose probe score exceeds a threshold have their advantage zeroed. *Our central finding is that a probe trained on a frozen base, with verifier-derived labels and no human annotation, provides a stable signal that suppresses theater while resisting the RL-obfuscation failure mode predicted by prior work.* Across four reasoning domains (GSM8K, LiveCodeBench, ToolUse, MMLU-Redux) and two model architectures (Llama-8B, Qwen-7B), ProFIL reduces post-commitment theater by **11--100%**, raises faithful-fraction (e.g., +24pp on LiveCodeBench under an independent Claude 3.7 Sonnet judge), and shortens chains by 4--19%, all while preserving or improving task accuracy. ProFIL also beats a matched length-penalty GRPO baseline, isolating the gain as semantic commitment-detection rather than chain compression. Probe weights, training configurations, and rollouts are released across all four domains.
title_zh: 别装了：探针过滤强化学习用于忠实思维链推理
abstract_zh: 推理模型会在内部已经确定的答案之后进行事后合理化，生成所谓的"推理剧场"：看似深思熟虑的步骤，实际上对正确性毫无贡献。这不仅浪费推理标记，污染可解释性，还掩盖了模型实际计算的内容。我们提出**ProFIL**（**探针过滤强化学习**），旨在通过一个可直接接入组相对策略优化（GRPO）的扩展模块，同时实现"减少剧场效应、提升思维链忠实度、缩短链长"三大目标。一个多头注意力探针在**冻结**的基模型上经过**一次性**训练，仅凭内部激活即可检测"答案确定后"的步骤；在GRPO中，探针得分超过阈值的展开序列，其优势将被归零。*我们的核心发现是：基于冻结基模型训练、利用验证器派生标签且无需人工标注的探针，能够提供稳定信号，有效抑制剧场效应，同时抵御前人工作预测的RL混淆失效模式。* 在四个推理领域（GSM8K、LiveCodeBench、ToolUse、MMLU-Redux）和两种模型架构（Llama-8B、Qwen-7B）上，ProFIL将事后剧场效应降低**11%至100%**，提升了忠实片段比例（例如，在独立评估器Claude 3.7 Sonnet下，LiveCodeBench上提升24个百分点），并将链长缩短4%至19%，同时保持或提升了任务准确率。ProFIL还超越了匹配长度的GRPO基线，收益归因于语义层面的承诺检测而非链压缩。探针权重、训练配置和展开序列已在所有四个领域发布。

title: An Empirical Study of Automating Agent Evaluation
authors: Kang Zhou, Sangmin Woo, Haibo Ding, Kiran Ramnath, Subramanian Chidambaram, Aosong Feng, Vinayak Arannil, Muhyun Kim, Ishan Singh, Darren Wang, Zhichao Xu, Megha Gandhi, Nirmal Prabhu, Soumya Smruti Mishra, Vivek Singh, Gouri Pandeshwar, Lin Lee Cheong
abstract: Agent evaluation requires assessing complex multi-step behaviors involving tool use and intermediate reasoning, making it costly and expertise-intensive. A natural question arises: can frontier coding assistants reliably automate this evaluation process? Our study shows that simply prompting coding assistants is insufficient for this task. Without domain-specific evaluation knowledge, frontier coding assistants achieve only a 30% execution success rate and produce over-engineered evaluations averaging 12+ metrics per agent, indicating that strong coding ability does not automatically translate to reliable agent evaluation. We introduce EvalAgent, an AI assistant that automates the end-to-end agent evaluation pipeline. EvalAgent encodes evaluation domain expertise as evaluation skills (procedural instructions, reusable code and templates, and dynamically retrieved API documentation) that compose into a trace-based pipeline producing complete evaluation artifacts including metrics, executable code, and reports. To systematically assess generated evaluations, we introduce a meta-evaluation framework alongside AgentEvalBench, a benchmark comprising 20 agents, each paired with evaluation requirements and test scenarios. We further propose the Eval@1 metric to measure whether generated evaluation code both executes and yields meaningful results on the first run. Our experiments show that EvalAgent produces focused evaluations, improving Eval@1 from 17.5% to 65%, and achieving 79.5% human expert preference over baseline approaches. Further ablation studies show that evaluation skills are critical for handling complex evaluation: removing them causes Eval@1 to drop significantly from 65% to 30%.
title_zh: 自动化智能体评估的实证研究
abstract_zh: 代理评估需要评估涉及工具使用和中间推理的复杂多步行为，这使得评估过程成本高昂且需要大量专业知识。一个自然的问题是：前沿编码助手能否可靠地自动化这一评估流程？我们的研究表明，简单地对编码助手进行提示不足以完成此任务。缺乏特定领域的评估知识时，前沿编码助手的执行成功率仅为30%，并且会产生过度设计的评估结果，平均每个代理评估包含12个以上的指标，这表明强大的编码能力并不能自动转化为可靠的代理评估。我们推出了EvalAgent，一个自动化端到端代理评估流程的AI助手。EvalAgent将评估领域专业知识编码为评估技能（包括程序化指令、可复用代码和模板，以及动态检索的API文档），这些技能组合成基于跟踪的流水线，生成完整的评估产物，包括指标、可执行代码和报告。为了系统评估生成的评估结果，我们引入了元评估框架以及AgentEvalBench基准测试集，该基准包含20个代理，每个代理配有评估需求和测试场景。我们进一步提出了Eval@1指标，用于衡量生成的评估代码在首次运行时是否能成功执行并产生有意义的结果。实验表明，EvalAgent能生成聚焦的评估结果，将Eval@1从17.5%提升至65%，并在基线方法中获得了79.5%的人类专家偏好。进一步的消融研究表明，评估技能对于处理复杂评估至关重要：去除这些技能后，Eval@1从65%显著下降至30%。

title: ShapeCodeBench: A Renewable Benchmark for Perception-to-Program Reconstruction of Synthetic Shape Scenes
authors: Shivam Kumar
abstract: We introduce ShapeCodeBench, a synthetic benchmark for perception-to-program reconstruction: given a rendered raster image, a model must emit an executable drawing program that a deterministic evaluator re-renders and compares with the target. The v1 DSL has four primitives on a 512 x 512 black-on-white canvas, but every instance is generated from a seeded RNG, so fresh held-out sets can be created to reduce exact-instance contamination. We release a frozen eval_v1 split with 150 samples across easy, medium, and hard tiers, scored by exact match, pixel accuracy, foreground IoU, parse success, and execution success. We evaluate an empty-program floor, a classical computer-vision heuristic, Claude Opus 4.7 at high and max effort, and GPT-5.5 at medium and extra_high reasoning effort. The heuristic is competitive on easy scenes but collapses when overlaps fuse components; the strongest multimodal configuration preserves much of the foreground structure but still misses exact match because of small parameter errors. Best overall exact match remains low, so ShapeCodeBench is far from saturated. The benchmark code, frozen dataset, run artifacts, and paper sources are released to support independent replication and extension.
title_zh: ShapeCodeBench: 一个用于合成形状场景的感知到程序重建的可更新基准
abstract_zh: 我们推出了ShapeCodeBench，这是一个用于感知到程序重建的合成基准测试：给定一张渲染后的栅格图像，模型必须生成一个可执行的绘图程序，由确定性评估器重新渲染并与目标图像进行比较。v1领域特定语言（DSL）在512×512的黑底白字画布上包含四个基本图元，但每个实例均由带种子的随机数生成器生成，因此可以创建全新的保留集以减少精确实例的污染。我们发布了一个冻结的eval_v1数据集分割，包含150个样本，分为简单、中等和困难三个等级，并通过精确匹配、像素准确率、前景交并比、解析成功率和执行成功率进行评分。我们评估了空程序基准、经典计算机视觉启发式方法、Claude Opus 4.7（高努力和最大努力）以及GPT-5.5（中等和超高等推理努力）。启发式方法在简单场景中表现出竞争力，但当重叠导致组件融合时性能崩溃；最强的多模态配置保留了大部分前景结构，但由于参数微小误差仍未能实现精确匹配。整体最佳精确匹配率依然较低，因此ShapeCodeBench远未饱和。基准测试代码、冻结数据集、运行产物及论文资料均已发布，以支持独立复现和扩展。

title: NeuroFlake: A Neuro-Symbolic LLM Framework for Flaky Test Classification
authors: Khondaker Tasnia Hoque, Toukir Ahammed
abstract: Flaky tests, which exhibit non-deterministic pass/fail behavior for the same version of code, pose significant challenges to reliable regression testing. While large language models (LLMs) promise for automated flaky test classification, they often fail to comprehend the actual logic behind test flakiness, instead overfitting to superficial textual artifacts (e.g., specific variable names). This semantic fragility leads to poor generalization on real-world imbalance dataset and vulnerability to perturbations. In this paper, we introduce NeuroFlake, a novel neuro-Symbolic framework for classifying flaky tests on highly imbalanced, real-world datasets (FlakeBench). Unlike prior approaches that rely on brittle manual rule and black box learning, NeuroFlake integrates a Discriminative Token Mining (DTM) module to automate the discovery of high-fidelity, statistically significant source code tokens (e.g., specific concurrency primitives or async waits). By injecting these strong latent signals directly into LLM's attention mechanism, we bridge the gap between neural intuition and symbolic precision. Our experiments demonstrate that neuro-symbolic fusion significantly improves classification performance by leveraging classification F1-score to 69.34% while prior state-of-art shows best F1-score 65.79%. However, we rigorously evaluate NeuroFlake's robustness through adversarial stress testing, introducing semantic preserving augmentations (e.g., dead code injection, variable renaming). While baseline models exhibit performance degradation of 8-18 percentage points (pp) on perturbed tests, NeuroFlake maintains performance stability on unseen augmentations dropping only 4-7 pp.
title_zh: NeuroFlake：一种用于不稳定测试分类的神经符号大型语言模型框架
abstract_zh: 不稳定测试（Flaky tests）对于同一版本代码表现出非确定性的通过/失败行为，给可靠的回归测试带来了重大挑战。尽管大语言模型（LLMs）有望实现自动化的不稳定测试分类，但它们通常无法理解测试不稳定性背后的实际逻辑，反而过度拟合于表面性的文本人为产物（例如特定的变量名）。这种语义上的脆弱性导致了在真实世界不平衡数据集上的泛化能力差，并且容易受到扰动的影响。在本文中，我们提出了NeuroFlake，一种新颖的神经符号框架，用于在高度不平衡的真实世界数据集（FlakeBench）上对不稳定测试进行分类。与先前依赖脆弱的规则和黑盒学习的方法不同，NeuroFlake集成了判别性令牌挖掘（DTM）模块，以自动发现高保真、统计上显著的源代码令牌（例如特定的并发原语或异步等待）。通过将这些强潜在信号直接注入到LLM的注意力机制中，我们弥合了神经直觉与符号精确性之间的差距。我们的实验表明，神经符号融合显著提高了分类性能，将分类F1分数提升至69.34%，而先前的最优方法最佳F1分数为65.79%。然而，我们通过对抗性压力测试严格评估了NeuroFlake的鲁棒性，引入了语义保持的扩充（例如死代码注入、变量重命名）。基线模型在扰动测试上表现出8-18个百分点（pp）的性能下降，而NeuroFlake在未见过的扩充上保持性能稳定，仅下降4-7个百分点。

title: StepCodeReasoner: Aligning Code Reasoning with Stepwise Execution Traces via Reinforcement Learning
authors: Hao Wang, Rui Li, Lei Sha, Jie M. Zhang
abstract: Existing code reasoning methods primarily supervise final code outputs, ignoring intermediate states, often leading to reward hacking where correct answers are obtained through inconsistent reasoning. We propose StepCodeReasoner, a framework that introduces explicit intermediate execution-state supervision. By automatically inserting structured print-based execution-trace anchors into code, the model is trained to predict runtime states at each step, transforming code reasoning into a verifiable, stepwise execution modeling problem. Building on this execution-aware method, we introduce Bi-Level GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm for structured credit assignment at two levels: inter-trajectory, comparing alternative execution paths, and intra-trajectory, rewarding intermediate accuracy based on its impact on downstream correctness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that StepCodeReasoner achieves SOTA performance in code reasoning. In particular, our 7B model achieves 91.1\% on CRUXEval and 86.5\% on LiveCodeBench, outperforming the CodeReasoner-7B baseline (86.0\% and 77.7\%) and GPT-4o (85.6\% and 75.1\%). Furthermore, on the execution-trace benchmark REval, our model scores 82.9\%, outperforming baseline CodeReasoner-7B (72.3\%), its 14B counterpart (81.1\%), and GPT-4o (77.3\%). Additionally, our approach also improves code generation performance, demonstrating that explicit execution modeling enhances both code reasoning and code generation.
title_zh: StepCodeReasoner: 通过强化学习将代码推理与逐步执行轨迹对齐
abstract_zh: 现有的代码推理方法主要对最终的代码输出进行监督，忽略了中间状态，这常常导致奖励黑客行为，即通过不一致的推理获得正确答案。我们提出StepCodeReasoner框架，该框架引入了显式的中间执行状态监督。通过在代码中自动插入基于结构化打印的执行轨迹锚点，模型被训练以预测每一步的运行时状态，从而将代码推理转化为可验证的、逐步执行的建模问题。基于这种感知执行的方法，我们引入了双层GRPO，这是一种强化学习算法，用于在两个层面进行结构化信用分配：在轨迹间层面，比较不同的执行路径；在轨迹内层面，根据中间准确性对下游正确性的影响给予奖励。大量实验表明，StepCodeReasoner在代码推理中达到了最先进的性能。特别是，我们的7B模型在CRUXEval上达到91.1%，在LiveCodeBench上达到86.5%，优于CodeReasoner-7B基线（86.0%和77.7%）和GPT-4o（85.6%和75.1%）。此外，在执行轨迹基准REval上，我们的模型得分82.9%，优于基线CodeReasoner-7B（72.3%）、其14B对应版本（81.1%）和GPT-4o（77.3%）。此外，我们的方法还提升了代码生成性能，表明显式的执行建模同时增强了代码推理和代码生成。

title: Behavioral Integrity Verification for AI Agent Skills
authors: Yuhao Wu, Tung-Ling Li, Hongliang Liu
abstract: Agent skills extend LLM agents with privileged third-party capabilities such as filesystem access, credentials, network calls, and shell execution. Existing safety work catches malicious prompts and risky runtime actions, but the skill artifact itself goes unverified. We formalize this as the behavioral integrity verification (BIV) problem: a typed set comparison between declared and actual capabilities over a shared taxonomy that bridges code, instructions, and metadata. The BIV framework instantiates this comparison by pairing deterministic code analysis with LLM-assisted capability extraction. The resulting structured evidence supports three downstream analyses: deviation taxonomy, root-cause classification, and malicious-skill detection. On 49,943 skills from the OpenClaw registry, the deviation taxonomy reveals a pervasive description-implementation gap: 80.0% of skills deviate from declared behavior, with four novel compound-threat categories surfaced. Root-cause classification finds that deviations are mostly oversight, not malice: 81.1% trace to developer oversight and 18.9% to adversarial intent, with 5.0% of skills carrying predicted multi-stage attack chains. On a 906-skill malicious-skill detection benchmark, BIV reaches an F1 of 0.946, outperforming state-of-the-art rule-based and single-pass LLM baselines. These results demonstrate behavioral integrity auditing for agent skills at scale.
title_zh: AI智能体技能的行为完整性验证
abstract_zh: 代理技能为LLM代理扩展了特权第三方能力，例如文件系统访问、凭证、网络调用和Shell执行。现有的安全研究工作能够捕捉恶意提示词和危险的运行时行为，但技能工件本身却未经审核。我们将其形式化为行为完整性验证（BIV）问题：即在共享分类体系上，对声明能力与实际能力进行带类型集合比较，该分类体系连接了代码、指令和元数据。BIV框架通过将确定性代码分析与LLM辅助的能力提取相结合来实现这一比较。由此产生的结构化证据支持三项下游分析：偏差分类、根因分类和恶意技能检测。在来自OpenClaw注册表的49,943个技能中，偏差分类揭示了一个普遍存在的描述-实现差距：80.0%的技能偏离了声明的行为，并发现了四种新型复合威胁类别。根因分类发现偏差大多是疏忽而非恶意：81.1%源于开发者疏忽，18.9%源于对抗意图，其中5.0%的技能携带预测的多阶段攻击链。在一个包含906个技能的恶意技能检测基准测试中，BIV达到了0.946的F1分数，超越了最先进的基于规则的基线方法和单次LLM基线方法。这些结果展示了大规模代理技能的行为完整性审计能力。

title: Uncertainty Quantification for LLM-based Code Generation
authors: Senrong Xu, Yuhao Tan, Yanke Zhou, Guangyuan Wu, Zenan Li, Yuan Yao, Taolue Chen, Feng Xu, Xiaoxing Ma
abstract: Prediction sets provide a theoretically grounded framework for quantifying uncertainty in machine learning models. Adapting them to structured generation tasks, in particular, large language model (LLM) based code generation, remains a challenging problem. An existing attempt proposes PAC prediction sets but is limited by its strong monotonicity assumption on risk and single-label classification framework, which severely limits the space of candidate programs and cannot accommodate the multiple valid outputs inherent to code generation. To address these limitations, we propose an approach RisCoSet that leverages multiple hypothesis testing to construct risk-controlling predictions for LLM-based code generation. Given a trained code generation model, we produce a prediction set represented by a partial program, which is guaranteed to contain a correct solution with high confidence. Extensive experiments on three LLMs demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. For instance, compared with the state-of-the-art, our method can significantly reduce the code removal by up to 24.5%, at the same level of risk.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的代码生成中的不确定性量化
abstract_zh: 预测集为量化机器学习模型的不确定性提供了理论基础。然而，将它们适应于结构化生成任务，特别是基于大语言模型（LLM）的代码生成，仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。现有的尝试提出了PAC预测集，但其对风险的强单调性假设和单标签分类框架严重限制了候选程序的空间，且无法容纳代码生成中固有的多个有效输出。为解决这些限制，我们提出了一种名为RisCoSet的方法，利用多重假设检验为基于LLM的代码生成构建风险可控的预测。给定一个训练好的代码生成模型，我们生成一个由部分程序表示的预测集，该预测集保证以高置信度包含一个正确的解决方案。在三个LLM上的大量实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。例如，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在相同风险水平下可显著减少代码删除量，最高达24.5%。

title: Rollout Cards: A Reproducibility Standard for Agent Research
authors: Charlie Masters, Ziyuan Liu, Stefano V. Albrecht
abstract: Reproducibility problems that have long affected machine learning and reinforcement learning are now surfacing in agent research: papers compare systems by reported scores while leaving the rollout records behind those scores difficult to inspect. For agentic tasks, this matters because the same behaviour can receive different reported scores when evaluations select different parts of a rollout or apply different reporting rules. In a structured audit of 50 popular training and evaluation repositories, we find that none report how many runs failed, errored, or were skipped alongside headline scores. We also document 37 cases where reporting rules can change task-success rates, cost/token accounting, or timing measurements for fixed evidence, sometimes dramatically. We treat rollout records, not reported scores, as the unit of reproducibility for agent research. We introduce rollout cards: publication bundles that preserve the rollout record and declare the views, reporting rules, and drops manifests behind reported scores. We validate rollout cards in two settings. First, four partial public releases in tool safety, multi-agent systems, theorem proving, and search let us compute analyses their original reports did not include. Second, re-grading preserved benchmark outputs across short-answer, code-generation, and tool-use tasks shows that changing only the reporting rule can change reported scores by 20.9 absolute percentage points and, in some cases, invert rankings of frontier models. We release a reference implementation integrated into Ergon, an open-source reinforcement learning gym, and publicly publish Ergon-produced rollout-card exports for benchmarks spanning tool use, software engineering, web interaction, multi-agent coordination, safety, and search to support future research.
title_zh: Rollout卡片：一种智能体研究的可重复性标准
abstract_zh: 长期以来困扰机器学习和强化学习的可重复性问题，如今正在代理研究中浮现：论文通过报告分数来比较系统，但产生这些分数背后的流程记录却难以审查。对于代理型任务，这一点至关重要，因为当评估选择流程的不同部分或应用不同报告规则时，相同的行为可能获得不同的报告分数。在对50个流行训练和评估库的结构化审计中，我们发现，没有任何一个库会报告有多少次运行失败、出错或被跳过，同时给出标题分数。我们还记录了37个案例，其中报告规则可以改变任务成功概率、成本/代币核算或固定证据的时间测量结果，有时变化幅度巨大。我们将流程记录（而非报告分数）视为代理研究的可重复性单位。我们引入了流程卡：一种出版物捆绑包，它保留流程记录，并声明报告分数背后的视图、报告规则和丢弃清单。我们在两个场景中验证了流程卡。首先，在工具安全、多智能体系统、定理证明和搜索领域的四次部分公开发布中，我们可以计算出原始报告未包含的分析。其次，在简答题、代码生成和工具使用任务中重新评分保留的基准输出表明，仅更改报告规则就可能使报告分数改变20.9个绝对百分点，并且在某些情况下会颠倒前沿模型的排名。我们发布了一个集成到Ergon（一个开源强化学习实验平台）中的参考实现，并公开了Ergon生成的流程卡导出文件，这些文件涵盖了工具使用、软件工程、网络交互、多智能体协调、安全性和搜索等基准测试，以支持未来研究。

title: ProfiliTable: Profiling-Driven Tabular Data Processing via Agentic Workflows
authors: Wei Liu, Yang Gu, Xi Yan, Zihan Nan, Beicheng Xu, Keyao Ding, Bin Cui, Wentao Zhang
abstract: Table processing-including cleaning, transformation, augmentation, and matching-is a foundational yet error-prone stage in real-world data pipelines. While recent LLM-based approaches show promise for automating such tasks, they often struggle in practice due to ambiguous instructions, complex task structures, and the lack of structured feedback, resulting in syntactically correct but semantically flawed code. To address these challenges, we propose ProfiliTable, an autonomous multi-agent framework centered on dynamic profiling, which constructs and iteratively refines a unified execution context through interactive exploration, knowledge-augmented synthesis, and feedback-driven refinement. ProfiliTable integrates (i) a Profiler that performs ReAct-style data exploration to build semantic understanding, (ii) a Generator that retrieves curated operators to synthesize task-aware code, and (iii) an Evaluator-Summarizer loop that injects execution scores and diagnostic insights to enable closed-loop refinement. Extensive experiments on a diverse benchmark covering 18 tabular task types demonstrate that ProfiliTable consistently outperforms strong baselines, particularly in complex multi-step scenarios. These results highlight the critical role of dynamic profiling in reliably translating ambiguous user intents into robust and governance-compliant table transformations.
title_zh: ProfiliTable：基于剖析的智能体工作流驱动的表格数据处理
abstract_zh: 表格处理——包括清洗、转换、增强和匹配——是实际数据管道中基础但易出错的阶段。尽管近期基于大语言模型的方法在自动化此类任务方面展现出潜力，但由于指令模糊、任务结构复杂且缺乏结构化反馈，这些方法在实践中常面临挑战，导致生成的代码虽语法正确却在语义上存在缺陷。为应对这些问题，我们提出ProfiliTable——一种以动态配置分析为核心的自主多智能体框架，它通过交互式探索、知识增强合成与反馈驱动优化，构建并迭代优化统一的执行上下文。ProfiliTable集成：（i）分析器，采用ReAct风格的探索以构建语义理解；（ii）生成器，检索定制化算子以合成任务感知型代码；以及（iii）评估-总结器循环，注入执行评分与诊断洞察以实现闭环优化。在覆盖18种表格任务类型的多样化基准上的大量实验表明，ProfiliTable持续优于强基线方法，尤其在复杂多步场景中。这些结果突显了动态配置分析在将模糊用户意图可靠转化为稳健且符合治理规范的表格转换中的关键作用。

title: Data-aware candidate selection in NL2SQL translation via small separating instances
authors: Stanislav Kikot, Alexander Shulgin, Yanwei Xu
abstract: We propose a data-aware candidate selection method for NL2SQL translation based on separating instances and provenance. We implement this approach and evaluate it against three natural baselines on a subset of BIRD-DEV. Experiments show that our method significantly outperforms baselines when only two or three candidates are given and no consistency score is available. The code of our prototype can be found at https://github.com/staskikotx/SISelection
title_zh: 基于小型分离实例的NL2SQL翻译中的数据感知候选选择
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于实例与来源分离的数据感知候选选择方法，用于自然语言到SQL（NL2SQL）的翻译。我们在BIRD-DEV子集上实现了该方法，并与三种自然基线进行了评估。实验表明，当仅提供两个或三个候选且缺乏一致性分数时，我们的方法显著优于基线。原型代码可访问https://github.com/staskikotx/SISelection获取。

title: CIDR: A Large-Scale Industrial Source Code Dataset for Software Engineering Research
authors: Vladislav Savenkov
abstract: We present Curated Industrial Developer Repository (CIDR), a large-scale dataset of real-world software repositories collected through direct collaboration with 12 industrial partner organizations. The dataset comprises 2,440 repositories spanning 138 programming languages and totalling 373 million lines of code, accompanied by structured per-repository metadata. Unlike existing code corpora derived from public open-source platforms, CIDR consists exclusively of proprietary production codebases contributed under formal data sharing agreements, covering application domains including enterprise web and mobile development, fintech, and custom software consultancy. All repositories were processed through a multi-stage pipeline encompassing structured partner onboarding, two-stage quality selection combining automated metadata filtering with manual code review, and a deterministic anonymization pipeline covering the full version control history. The dataset is intended to support research in code intelligence, software quality analysis, pre-training and fine-tuning of code language models, developer behaviour studies, and construction of agent evaluation benchmarks. Access is provided under a restricted commercial license; details are available at https://fermatix.ai/#Contact.
title_zh: CIDR：用于软件工程研究的大规模工业源代码数据集
abstract_zh: 我们提出了精选工业开发者库（CIDR），这是一个通过与12个工业合作伙伴组织直接合作收集的大规模真实世界软件仓库数据集。该数据集包含2,440个仓库，涵盖138种编程语言，总计3.73亿行代码，并附有结构化的每仓库元数据。与源自公共开源平台的现有代码语料库不同，CIDR完全由在正式数据共享协议下贡献的专有生产代码库组成，覆盖包括企业网络和移动开发、金融科技以及定制软件咨询在内的应用领域。所有仓库都经过了一个多阶段流程的处理，包括结构化的合作伙伴接入、结合自动元数据过滤和手动代码审查的两阶段质量选择，以及覆盖完整版本历史记录的可确定性匿名化流程。该数据集旨在支持代码智能、软件质量分析、代码语言模型的预训练和微调、开发者行为研究以及代理评估基准构建等研究。访问需获得限制性商业许可；详情请访问https://fermatix.ai/#Contact。

title: Hindsight Hint Distillation: Scaffolded Reasoning for SWE Agents from CoT-free Answers
authors: Shengjie Wang, Guanghe Li, Zonghan Yang, Yang Gao
abstract: Solving complex long-horizon tasks requires strong planning and reasoning capabilities. Although datasets with explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) rationales can substantially benefit learning, they are costly to obtain. To address this challenge, we propose Hindsight Hint Distillation (HHD), which only requires easy-to-obtain question-answer pairs without CoT annotations. Inspired by how human teachers use student mistakes to provide targeted guidance, HHD synthesizes hindsight hints from the model's own failed self-rollouts and uses them to scaffold on-policy rollouts that successfully complete the tasks. The model then self-distills these scaffolded trajectories and generalizes to new problems without hint guidance. Experiments show that HHD significantly outperforms iterative RFT and trajectory-synthesis baselines, achieving an absolute improvement of 8\% on SWE-bench Verified, while all baselines improve by only around 2\%. Notably, the reasoning strategies induced by HHD generalize effectively to out-of-distribution tasks, yielding the largest gains on SWE-bench Multilingual despite no training on multilingual data. These results demonstrate that HHD can effectively synthesize expert-like reasoning from CoT-free data and substantially improve long-horizon performance.
title_zh: 事后提示蒸馏：面向无CoT答案的软件工程代理的支架式推理
abstract_zh: 解决复杂的长期任务需要强大的规划与推理能力。虽然带有显式思维链（CoT）推理过程的数据集能显著促进学习，但获取成本高昂。为应对这一挑战，我们提出事后提示蒸馏（HHD），该方法仅需易于获取且无CoT标注的问答对。受教师利用学生错误提供针对性指导的启发，HHD从模型自身失败的自我生成的轨迹中合成事后提示，并利用这些提示辅助能成功完成任务的在策略轨迹生成。然后，模型自我蒸馏这些受辅助的轨迹，并在无提示引导下泛化至新问题。实验表明，HHD显著优于迭代RFT与轨迹合成基线，在SWE-bench Verified上取得8%的绝对提升，而所有基线仅提升约2%。值得注意的是，HHD诱导的推理策略能有效泛化至分布外任务，在SWE-bench Multilingual上取得最大收益，尽管未在多语言数据上训练。这些结果表明，HHD能够从无CoT数据中有效合成专家级推理，并显著提升长期任务性能。

title: Decaf: Improving Neural Decompilation with Automatic Feedback and Search
authors: Alexander Shypula, Osbert Bastani, Edward Schwartz
abstract: Decompilers are useful tools used in reverse engineering to understand compiled source code. Reconstructing source code from compiled binaries is a challenging task, because high-level syntax, identifiers, and custom data types are generally lost as the compiler translates human-readable code to low-level machine code. Deterministic decompilers are useful tools for binary analysis, but can struggle to infer idiomatic syntax and identifier names. Generative AI models are a natural fit for reconstructing high-level syntax, identifiers, and types, but they can still suffer by hallucinating improper programming constructs and semantics. Instead of attempting to improve neural decompilers with more data and more training, we argue that compiler feedback can be used to dramatically improve the semantic correctness of neural decompiler outputs via search. Our system, Decaf (DECompilation with Automated Feedback), raises the neural decompilation rate from 26.0% on ExeBench to 83.9% on the Real -O2 split without sacrificing similarity to the original source code. We also find our automatic feedback methodology is highly effective for improving weaker neural decompilation models.
title_zh: Decaf: 利用自动反馈和搜索改进神经反编译
abstract_zh: 反编译器是逆向工程中用于理解编译后源代码的有用工具。从编译后的二进制文件中重构源代码是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为在编译器将人类可读的代码转换为低级机器码的过程中，高级语法、标识符以及自定义数据类型通常会丢失。确定性反编译器是二进制分析的有用工具，但在推断惯用语法和标识符名称方面可能效果不佳。生成式AI模型天生适合重构高级语法、标识符和类型，但它们可能因幻觉而产生不正确的编程结构和语义。我们并未试图通过增加数据和训练来改进神经反编译器，而是主张利用编译器反馈，通过搜索方法显著提升神经反编译器输出的语义正确性。我们的系统Decaf（带自动反馈的反编译）将ExeBench数据集上的神经反编译率从26.0%提升至Real -O2分割上的83.9%，同时不牺牲与原始源代码的相似性。我们还发现，这种自动反馈方法在改进较弱的神经反编译模型方面非常有效。

title: An Extensive Replication Study of the ABLoTS Approach for Bug Localization
authors: Feifei Niu, Enshuo Zhang, Christoph Mayr-Dorn, Wesley Klewerton Guez Assunção, Liguo Huang, Jidong Ge, Bin Luo, Alexander Egyed
abstract: Bug localization is the task of recommending source code locations (typically files) that contain the cause of a bug and hence need to be changed to fix the bug. Along these lines, information retrieval-based bug localization (IRBL) approaches have been adopted, which identify the most bug-prone files from the source code space. In current practice, a series of state-of-the-art IRBL techniques leverage the combination of different components (e.g., similar reports, version history, and code structure) to achieve better performance. ABLoTS is a recently proposed approach with the core component, TraceScore, that utilizes requirements and traceability information between different issue reports (i.e., feature requests and bug reports) to identify buggy source code snippets with promising results. To evaluate the accuracy of these results and obtain additional insights into the practical applicability of ABLoTS, we conducted a replication study of this approach with the original dataset and also on two extended datasets (i.e., additional Java dataset and Python dataset). The original dataset consists of 11 open source Java projects with 8,494 bug reports. The extended Java dataset includes 16 more projects comprising 25,893 bug reports and corresponding source code commits. The extended Python dataset consists of 12 projects with 1,289 bug reports. While we find that the TraceScore component, which is the core of ABLoTS, produces comparable or even better results with the extended datasets, we also find that we cannot reproduce the ABLoTS results, as reported in its original paper, due to an overlooked side effect of incorrectly choosing a cut-off date that led to test data leaking into training data with significant effects on performance.
title_zh: 针对ABLoTS缺陷定位方法的一项大规模复制研究
abstract_zh: 错误定位是指推荐包含错误根源的源代码位置（通常是文件），从而需要修改这些位置以修复错误的任务。沿着这一思路，基于信息检索的错误定位（IRBL）方法已被采用，这些方法从源代码空间中识别最易出现错误的文件。在当前的实践中，一系列最先进的IRBL技术利用不同组件（例如，相似报告、版本历史和代码结构）的组合来实现更好的性能。ABLoTS是最近提出的一种方法，其核心组件TraceScore利用需求以及不同问题报告（即特性请求和错误报告）之间的可追溯性信息来识别有错误的源代码片段，并取得了有前景的结果。为了评估这些结果的准确性，并进一步了解ABLoTS在实际应用中的可行性，我们使用原始数据集以及两个扩展数据集（即额外的Java数据集和Python数据集）对该方法进行了复现研究。原始数据集包含11个开源Java项目中的8494个错误报告。扩展的Java数据集增加了16个项目，包括25893个错误报告及相应的源代码提交。扩展的Python数据集包含12个项目中的1289个错误报告。我们发现，作为ABLoTS核心的TraceScore组件在扩展数据集上产生了可比甚至更好的结果，但我们也发现，由于一个被忽视的副作用——错误地选择了截止日期，导致测试数据泄露到训练数据中，从而对性能产生了显著影响，我们无法复现原始论文中报告的ABLoTS结果。

title: Breaking the Dependency Chaos: A Constraint-Driven Python Dependency Resolution Strategy with Selective LLM Imputation
authors: Kowshik Chowdhury, Dipayan Banik, Shazibul Islam Shamim
abstract: Dependency resolution is the task of selecting package versions that can be installed together without conflicts. It accounts for a significant share of build failures in modern software projects. In the Python ecosystem, this task is especially challenging due to Python 2/3 incompatibilities, deprecated packages, and widespread missing metadata. Recent work, such as PLLM, tackles this problem by using large language models (LLMs) to infer Python and package versions from code and iteratively repairing them based on build errors. We present SMT-LLM, a hybrid system that replaces LLM-only version guessing with formal constraint solving. SMT-LLM uses deterministic import extraction and Python version detection via abstract syntax tree (AST) analysis, the vermin tool to infer minimum Python versions, and a five-tier import-to-package resolver that queries PyPI before any LLM call. We construct a constraint graph from PyPI metadata and LLM-imputed dependencies for packages with missing metadata, then solve for consistent version assignments using a Z3 satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) solver. On the HG2.9K benchmark using Gemma2:9B (10 GB VRAM), SMT-LLM resolves 83.6% of snippets compared to PLLM's 54.8%, while reducing median resolution time from 151.5 s to 23.9 s (6.3x faster) and average LLM calls from ~24.9 to 2.26 per snippet (11x reduction).
title_zh: 打破依赖混乱：一种约束驱动的Python依赖解析策略结合选择性LLM注入
abstract_zh: 依赖解析是一项选择可无冲突地一起安装的软件包版本的任务。在现代软件项目中，该问题导致了大量的构建失败。在Python生态系统中，由于Python 2/3不兼容、已弃用的软件包以及普遍缺失的元数据，这一任务尤为棘手。近期的工作（如PLLM）通过使用大型语言模型（LLM）从代码中推断Python及软件包版本，并根据构建错误迭代修复来解决该问题。我们提出了SMT-LLM，一种混合系统，用形式化约束求解替代了仅依赖LLM的版本猜测。SMT-LLM借助抽象语法树（AST）分析实现确定性的导入提取和Python版本检测，使用vermin工具推断最小Python版本，并采用五级导入到软件包的解析器，在调用LLM前先查询PyPI。我们从PyPI元数据和LLM对缺失元数据软件包补全的依赖关系中构建约束图，然后利用Z3可满足性模理论（SMT）求解器求解一致的版本赋值。在采用Gemma2:9B（10 GB显存）的HG2.9K基准测试上，SMT-LLM可解析83.6%的代码片段，而PLLM仅为54.8%；同时中位解析时间从151.5秒降至23.9秒（提速6.3倍），每个代码片段平均调用LLM次数从约24.9次降至2.26次（减少11倍）。

title: MM-OptBench: A Solver-Grounded Benchmark for Multimodal Optimization Modeling
authors: Zhong Li, Qi Huang, Yuxuan Zhu, Mohammad Mohammadi Amiri, Niki van Stein, Thomas Bäck, Matthijs van Leeuwen, Zaiwen Wen, Lincen Yang
abstract: Optimization modeling translates real decision-making problems into mathematical optimization models and solver-executable implementations. Although language models are increasingly used to generate optimization formulations and solver code, existing benchmarks are almost entirely text-only. This omits many optimization-modeling tasks that arise in operational practice, where requirements are described in text but instance information is conveyed through visual artifacts such as tables, graphs, maps, schedules, and dashboards. We introduce multimodal optimization modeling, a benchmark setting in which models must construct both a mathematical formulation and executable solver code from a text-and-visual problem specification. To evaluate this setting, we develop a solver-grounded framework that generates structured optimization instances, verifies each with an exact solver, and builds both the model-facing inputs and hidden reference files from the same verified source. We instantiate the framework as MM-OptBench, a benchmark of 780 solver-verified instances spanning 6 optimization families, 26 subcategories, and 3 structural difficulty levels. We evaluate 9 multimodal large language models (MLLMs), including 6 frontier general-purpose models and 3 math-specialized models, with aggregate, family-level, difficulty-level, and failure-mode analyses. The results show that the task remains far from solved: the best two models reach 52.1% and 51.3% pass@1, while on average across the six general-purpose MLLMs, pass@1 is 43.4% on easy instances and 15.9% on hard instances. All three math-specialized MLLMs solve 0/780 instances. Failure attribution shows that errors arise both when extracting instance data from text and visuals and when turning extracted data into solver-correct formulations and code. MM-OptBench provides a testbed for solver-grounded, decision-oriented multimodal intelligence.
title_zh: MM-OptBench：一个基于求解器的多模态优化建模基准
abstract_zh: 优化建模将实际决策问题转化为数学优化模型和求解器可执行的实现。尽管语言模型越来越多地用于生成优化公式和求解器代码，但现有基准几乎完全是纯文本的。这遗漏了运营实践中出现的许多优化建模任务——在这些任务中，需求以文本描述，但实例信息通过表格、图形、地图、日程表和仪表盘等视觉载体传递。我们引入了多模态优化建模这一基准设定，要求模型根据文本与视觉混合的问题说明，同时构建数学公式和可执行的求解器代码。为评估该设定，我们开发了一个基于求解器的框架：生成结构化的优化实例，用精确求解器验证每个实例，并从同一经过验证的源构建模型面对的输入和隐藏的参考文件。我们将该框架实例化为MM-OptBench，这是一个包含780个经求解器验证实例的基准，涵盖6个优化家族、26个子类别和3个结构难度级别。我们评估了9个多模态大语言模型（MLLMs），包括6个前沿通用模型和3个数学专用模型，并进行了聚合级、家族级、难度级和失败模式分析。结果显示，该任务仍远未解决：最佳两个模型达到52.1%和51.3%的pass@1，而六个通用MLLMs平均在简单实例上pass@1为43.4%，在困难实例上为15.9%。三个数学专用MLLMs均未解决任何实例（0/780）。失败归因表明，错误既出现在从文本和视觉中提取实例数据时，也出现在将提取数据转化为求解器正确的公式和代码时。MM-OptBench为基于求解器、面向决策的多模态智能提供了一个测试平台。

title: Intelligent Code Analysis and Automated Testing Technologies for Power Grid Software Systems
authors: Jingyi Zhao
publish: 2026 2nd International Conference on Power Electronics and Electric Drives (PEED)
abstract: Power grid software used in dispatching, substation monitoring, metering, and distribution management must satisfy stronger safety, traceability, and release-governance requirements than generic enterprise applications. Although recent studies on Large Language Model (lLM)-assisted code review and automated test generation have improved developer productivity, their direct adoption in grid software remains limited by weak domain grounding, inadequate risk prioritization, and insufficient coupling between review evidence and Continuous Integration (CI) / Continuous Delivery (CD) execution. This paper proposes a lifecycle-aware intelligent engineering framework for power grid software systems. A bounded re-trieval-augmented semantic review module first extracts structured change intent from commits, requirement notes, and defect tickets, then retrieves grid rules, historical incidents, and CI evidence, and finally invokes a locally deployed code LLM only within a controlled context window to produce evidence-linked review comments and test intents. A multi-source risk model then integrates static severity, historical defect density, semantic change scope, business criticality, and test-gap signals to allocate validation budget and trigger staged execution. Generated tests are retained only after deterministic compilation, oracle checking, and sandbox validation, while high-risk changes additionally activate digital-twin replay. Experiments on $\mathbf{1 8 6}$ change sets from 12 grid-related repositories show that precision improves from 0.74 to 0.87, recall from 0.68 to 0.82, and effective coverage from 11% to 29%, while median review time is reduced by 34%. Paired statistical tests confirm that the improvements in precision, recall, and effective coverage are significant ($\mathbf{p}\lt0.01$).
title_zh: 面向电网软件系统的智能代码分析与自动化测试技术
abstract_zh: 用于调度、变电站监控、计量和配电管理的电网软件，必须满足比通用企业应用更严格的安全性、可追溯性和发布治理要求。尽管近期大语言模型（LLM）辅助的代码审查和自动化测试生成研究提升了开发者效率，但由于领域基础薄弱、风险优先级不足以及审查证据与持续集成/持续交付（CI/CD）执行之间耦合不够紧密，这些方法在电网软件中的直接应用仍受到限制。本文提出了一种面向电网软件系统的生命周期感知智能工程框架。首先，一个受限的检索增强语义审查模块从提交记录、需求说明和缺陷工单中提取结构化变更意图，然后检索电网规则、历史事件和CI证据，最后仅在受控上下文窗口内调用本地部署的代码LLM，生成附带证据链接的审查意见和测试意图。随后，一个多源风险模型整合了静态严重性、历史缺陷密度、语义变更范围、业务关键性和测试缺口信号，以分配验证预算并触发分阶段执行。生成的测试仅通过确定性编译、断言检查及沙箱验证后保留，而高风险变更还会额外触发数字孪生回放。在12个电网相关代码库的186个变更集上的实验表明，精确率从0.74提升至0.87，召回率从0.68提升至0.82，有效覆盖率从11%提升至29%，同时中位审查时间减少34%。配对统计检验证实，精确率、召回率和有效覆盖率的提升均具有显著性（p<0.01）。

title: AdaptGen: A Problem-Adaptive Solution Template Generation Technique for Online Programming Platforms
authors: Guowei Zhang, Weiqin Zou, Xiaowei Zhang, Jingxuan Zhang, Jifeng Xuan
abstract:
Online programming platforms that offer various programming tasks play a crucial role in helping programmers enhance their coding skills. Programming tasks posted for different application scenarios may follow the same or similar programming patterns in their solutions. This leads programmers to repeatedly write not just the core code of problem-solving, but also the same basic framework and some peripheral code (such as variable declarations and input/output handling) that are needed to make their solutions executable. Repeatedly writing boilerplate or well-mastered algorithmic frameworks wastes time and adds little value for programmers focused on skill-specific practice.

Toward this, we propose to develop AdaptGen, a problemadaptive code template generation method for online programming platforms. AdaptGen analyzes and extracts solution patterns from various programming problem solutions (i.e., code accepted by online programming platforms) and generates templates tailored to each problem. More specifically, AdaptGen is built on genetic programming and uses a linear hashing sequence encoding strategy to represent solutions. It incorporates selection, crossover, and de-duplication operators to maintain diversity in the evolution process, and a fitness function tailored to generate solution templates. These templates are then abstracted and structured with a flexible core-code-hiding mechanism, enabling programmers of different experience levels to practice efficiently.

We evaluated AdaptGen using two datasets from LeetCode and NowCoder, containing a total of 997 tasks and over 3,200 solution categories. Results show that AdaptGen successfully generates usable templates for 77%-84% of solution categories, with 80% of the templates performing well in manual evaluations. It also outperforms seven advanced representative large language models (LLMs), achieving the best overall performance in template quality, consistency, and generation efficiency. To validate Adapt- Gen’s effectiveness in real-world programming environments, we further conduct a user study involving live coding practice by programmers in online programming platforms, which effectively demonstrated its utility in practical application scenarios.
title_zh: AdaptGen: 一种面向在线编程平台的问题自适应解题模板生成技术
abstract_zh: 在线编程平台提供了多种编程任务，在帮助程序员提升编码技能方面发挥着关键作用。不同应用场景下的编程任务，其解决方案可能遵循相同或相似的编程模式。这导致程序员不仅需要重复编写解决问题的核心代码，还需重复编写使程序可执行所需的基础框架和一些外围代码（如变量声明、输入输出处理）。对于专注于特定技能练习的程序员而言，反复编写模板代码或已熟练掌握的算法框架既耗费时间，又价值有限。为此，我们提出开发AdaptGen——一种面向在线编程平台的自适应问题代码模板生成方法。AdaptGen通过分析并提取各类编程问题解决方案（即被在线编程平台接受的代码）中的模式，为每个问题生成定制化模板。具体而言，AdaptGen基于遗传编程构建，采用线性哈希序列编码策略表示解决方案。它融合了选择、交叉和去重算子以维持进化过程中的多样性，并设计了专门用于生成解决方案模板的适应度函数。这些模板随后通过灵活的核心代码隐藏机制进行抽象和结构化，使不同经验水平的程序员都能高效练习。我们使用来自LeetCode和NowCoder的两个数据集（共包含997个任务和超过3200个解决方案类别）对AdaptGen进行了评估。结果显示，AdaptGen成功为77%-84%的解决方案类别生成了可用的模板，其中80%的模板在人工评估中表现良好。与七个具有代表性的先进大型语言模型相比，AdaptGen在模板质量、一致性和生成效率方面均取得了最佳综合表现。为验证AdaptGen在真实编程环境中的有效性，我们进一步开展了包含程序员在在线编程平台上进行实时编码练习的用户研究，有效证明了其在实际应用场景中的实用性。

title: AI-Powered Transformer Framework for Intelligent Natural Language to SQL Query Generation
authors: P. Arul Prakash, Shakthi S, Sri Santhiya M P, Shreeja A V, Subash S, Eyamini C
publish: 2026 International Conference on Smart Futuristic Technology
abstract: Natural language database interfaces frequently do not generate SQL that is structurally correct when the queries involve complex joins, nested queries, and queries that are ambiguous in terms of schema. The work introduces an AI-powered Transformer framework that supports bidirectional semantic encoding, schema linking, and constraint-aware SQL generation. The model uses a pre-trained T5-Large encoder as well as a relational schema graph made up of 5,752 table-column nodes and 14,986 relationship edges allowing for reasoning over explicit structure. The framework is evaluated on the Spider and WikiSQL benchmarks of 10,181 training queries, 1,034 development queries, and 15,878 natural-language questions. The experiments achieve 84.72% exact-match accuracy on Spider and 92.41% logical-form accuracy on WikiSQL, surpassing the prior best baselines by 6.18% and 4.35%, respectively. SQL generation times were average 1.83 seconds and were brought down to 0.97 seconds for real time deployment. These results confirm that transformer driven semantic parsing leads to improvements in correctness, generalization and execution fidelity in NL-to-SQL translation. These results indicate that the framework proposed yields a gain in exact-match accuracy, reliability of execution and efficiency in latency in all types of database scenarios.
title_zh: 智能自然语言转SQL查询生成的AI驱动Transformer框架
abstract_zh: 自然语言数据库接口在处理涉及复杂连接、嵌套查询以及模式模糊的查询时，经常无法生成结构正确的SQL语句。本文提出了一种基于AI的Transformer框架，支持双向语义编码、模式链接和约束感知的SQL生成。该模型采用预训练的T5-Large编码器，并利用由5,752个表-列节点和14,986条关系边构成的关系模式图，以进行显式结构上的推理。该框架在包含10,181个训练查询、1,034个开发查询和15,878个自然语言问题的Spider和WikiSQL基准测试上进行了评估。实验在Spider上达到了84.72%的精确匹配准确率，在WikiSQL上达到了92.41%的逻辑形式准确率，分别超过先前最优基线6.18%和4.35%。SQL生成时间平均为1.83秒，为实时部署降至0.97秒。这些结果证实，基于Transformer的语义解析能够提升自然语言到SQL转换的正确性、泛化能力和执行保真度。这些结果表明，所提出的框架在所有类型的数据库场景中，在精确匹配准确率、执行可靠性和延迟效率方面均取得了提升。

title: Adaptive PWM Control using Machine Learning and RISC-V
authors: Abhinav Chalil, Vivek Ashok Nair, Rajesh Kannan Megalingam
publish: 2026 International Conference on Smart Futuristic Technology
abstract: This paper presents the design and virtual implementation of an Adaptive Pulse Width Modulation - PWM control system using Machine Learning and RISC-V architecture. Instead of actual physical hardware, the system is simulated using QEMU, BRISC-V, and EDA Playground. A machine learning Linear Regression model predicts the PWM duty cycle from parameters such as temperature,humidity and speed. The trained model runs on a RISC-V emulator which updates the duty cycles dynamically, while PWM In Verilog, waveform verification is done using GTKWave. Results confirm that adaptive PWM can be achieved entirely. accuracy of results and low latency in software, providing a cost-effective approach for intelligent control in embedded and IoT applications.
title_zh: 使用机器学习与RISC-V的自适应PWM控制
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了基于机器学习与RISC-V架构的自适应脉宽调制（PWM）控制系统的设计与虚拟实现。该系统未采用实际物理硬件，而是通过QEMU、BRISC-V和EDA Playground进行仿真。机器学习线性回归模型根据温度、湿度和速度等参数预测PWM占空比。训练后的模型在RISC-V模拟器上运行，动态更新占空比，同时通过Verilog实现PWM，并使用GTKWave进行波形验证。结果表明，完全能够实现自适应PWM，且在软件层面具有高精度和低延迟特性，为嵌入式及物联网应用中的智能控制提供了经济高效的解决方案。

title: SmartCode AI: A Hybrid Static Analysis and Ensemble Transformer Framework for Secure Code Review and Automated Remediation
authors: N. Uma Maheswari, A.K. Prabhakaran, R. Raja Vignesh, T. Ram Prakash, S. Sanju
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Inventive Computation Technologies (ICICT)
abstract: Application security vulnerabilities continue to dominate the threat landscape, contributing to nearly seventy percent of reported security breaches. The growing volume of software applications, combined with increasing architectural complexity, has significantly expanded the attack surface. Traditional Static Application Security Testing (SAST) tools remain widely adopted; however, existing approaches suffer from critical limitations. High false positive rates, often ranging between sixty and eighty percent, create alert fatigue and reduce developer trust. Pattern-based detection mechanisms lack contextual understanding of business logic, leading to misclassification of safe code as vulnerable. The absence of automated remediation further compounds the issue, as developers must manually interpret findings and design secure fixes. This manual effort increases remediation time, delays deployment cycles, and introduces inconsistency in patch quality. Limited scalability and integration flexibility also hinder continuous security monitoring across large repositories. The proposed SmartCode AI methodology addresses these challenges through a hybrid architecture integrating rule-based static analysis with an ensemble of transformer-based deep learning models. Initial candidate detection ensures broad vulnerability coverage, while contextual verification performed by multiple models significantly reduces false positives. Consensus-driven validation enhances reliability and minimizes inconsistent predictions. Automated patch generation further transforms vulnerability management from detection-only to detection-and-repair. Multi-layer validation ensures syntactic correctness, security compliance, and functional preservation before presenting fixes. A scalable microservices deployment model supports concurrent analysis of large repositories, reducing remediation time from days to hours. Benchmark evaluations demonstrate substantial improvement in precision, recall, F1-score, and patch success rate, validating the effectiveness of the integrated framework.
title_zh: SmartCode AI：一种混合静态分析与集成Transformer框架，用于安全代码审查和自动修复
abstract_zh: 应用程序安全漏洞持续主导威胁格局，占已报告安全漏洞的近百分之七十。软件应用数量的增长，加上架构复杂性的提升，显著扩大了攻击面。传统的静态应用安全测试（SAST）工具仍被广泛采用，但现有方法存在关键局限性。高达百分之六十到八十的误报率会导致警报疲劳并降低开发者信任。基于模式的检测机制缺乏对业务逻辑的上下文理解，导致将安全代码误分类为脆弱代码。缺乏自动修复功能进一步加剧了问题，开发者必须手动解读发现并设计安全补丁。这种人工努力延长了修复时间，延迟了部署周期，并导致补丁质量不一致。有限的可扩展性和集成灵活性也阻碍了对大型代码库进行持续安全监控。所提出的SmartCode AI方法通过一种混合架构解决了这些挑战，该架构将基于规则的静态分析与基于Transformer的深度学习模型集成在一起。初始候选检测确保了广泛的漏洞覆盖，而由多个模型执行的上下文验证显著降低了误报率。共识驱动的验证增强了可靠性并最小化了不一致的预测。自动补丁生成进一步将漏洞管理从仅检测转变为检测加修复。多层验证确保在提供修复方案之前实现语法正确性、安全合规性和功能保留。可扩展的微服务部署模型支持对大型代码库进行并发分析，将修复时间从数天缩短至数小时。基准评估表明，在精确率、召回率、F1分数和补丁成功率方面均有显著提升，验证了该集成框架的有效性。

title: Uncertainty-Calibrated Multi-Fidelity Graph Transformer for Integrated Circuit Parametric Performance Prediction and Hotspot Localization
authors: Chenxu Wang
publish: 2026 2nd International Conference on Power Electronics and Electric Drives (PEED)
abstract: Integrated circuit (IC) design and verification workflows frequently depend on corner-aware circuit simulation and post-layout signoff analysis, which incur substantial computational cost and limit rapid design space exploration. To address data scarcity and expensive high-fidelity simulation, this paper presents an uncertainty-calibrated multi-fidelity learning framework for parametric performance prediction and hotspot localization at the circuit level. A heterogeneous circuit graph is constructed to encode device attributes, net connectivity, and optional layout-aware context, enabling topology-preserving representation learning. A graph transformer is then employed to capture long-range dependencies across devices and nets, while a gated multi-fidelity fusion module models high-fidelity targets as a combination of low-fidelity trends and learnable residual corrections. To improve engineering reliability, conformal prediction is adopted to produce statistically valid prediction intervals, providing calibrated uncertainty alongside point estimates. In addition, attribution-based analysis on graph nodes and edges is introduced to identify performance-critical devices and interconnects, supporting hotspot localization. Experimental results on representative circuit benchmarks demonstrate improved accuracy and uncertainty calibration compared with conventional regression and graph neural network baselines under limited high-fidelity samples, while reducing the required number of expensive simulations for comparable predictive performance.
title_zh: 不确定性校准的多保真度图Transformer用于集成电路参数性能预测和热点定位
abstract_zh: 集成电路（IC）设计与验证流程通常依赖角点感知的电路仿真和后版图签核分析，这些过程计算成本高昂，限制了设计空间快速探索。针对数据稀缺与高保真仿真耗资巨大的问题，本文提出一种不确定性校准的多保真度学习框架，用于电路级参数性能预测与热点定位。首先构建异构图电路结构，编码器件属性、网表连接性及可选版图感知上下文，实现拓扑保持的表示学习。随后采用图变换器捕获跨器件与跨网表的远距离依赖关系，并设计门控多保真度融合模块，将高保真目标建模为低保真趋势与可学习的残差校正的组合。为提升工程可靠性，引入共形预测生成统计有效的预测区间，在点估计基础上提供校准后的不确定性度量。此外，通过基于图节点与边的归因分析，识别性能关键器件与互连结构，支持热点定位。在代表性电路基准上的实验结果表明，与传统回归方法和图神经网络基线相比，该方法在有限高保真样本下实现了更高的精度和不确定性校准，同时在达到相当预测性能时显著减少了所需的高代价仿真次数。

title: FIR Filter Implementation in XilinxISE for Radar Signal Processing
authors: Smitha N, Manjula Vasant Kiresur, Shreya M, Shreeja, Shreya V, Neha S M
publish: 2026 International Conference on Smart Futuristic Technology
abstract: This paper presents a radar signal processing using Finite Impulse Response (FIR) filters. Linear Frequency Modulated (LFM) chirp signals are employed to improve range resolution via pulse compression. FIR filters, chosen for their inherent stability and linear phase response, effectively suppress clutter and noise. MATLAB is used for precise filter coefficient design and signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) analysis, facilitating filter optimization. The optimized filters are implemented on Xilinx Spartan-6 FPGAs using the ISE environment, exploiting the FPGA’s parallel structure to enhance processing efficiency while reducing power consumption. Experimental results demonstrate improved radar signal clarity and enhanced detection performance. This work highlights the benefits of integrating MATLAB-based design tools with FPGA platforms, offering a scalable and efficient approach to high-performance radar signal processing.
title_zh: 在Xilinx ISE中用于雷达信号处理的FIR滤波器实现
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于有限脉冲响应（FIR）滤波器的雷达信号处理方法。采用线性调频（LFM）啁啾信号，通过脉冲压缩技术提升距离分辨率。选择具有固有稳定性和线性相位响应的FIR滤波器，有效抑制杂波和噪声。利用MATLAB进行精确的滤波器系数设计和信噪比（SNR）分析，以优化滤波器性能。优化后的滤波器在赛灵思Spartan-6 FPGA上，通过ISE环境实现，充分发挥FPGA的并行结构优势，提升处理效率并降低功耗。实验结果证实了雷达信号清晰度的改善和检测性能的提升。本工作凸显了将基于MATLAB的设计工具与FPGA平台相结合的优势，为高性能雷达信号处理提供了一种可扩展、高效的方案。

title: ECVchecker: Practical Detecting External Call Vulnerabilities in Solidity Smart Contracts With Semantic-Aware Symbolic Analysis
authors: Zequan Zhou, Xiling Luo, Xiaohai Ji, Jian Mao, Junjun Wang, Handong Zhao
publish: IEEE Transactions on Network Science and Engineering
abstract: Smart contracts often call each other to enable various applications, but nondeterministic external calls will introduce vulnerabilities, leading to significant asset losses. Checking contract external call vulnerabilities (ECVs) is a critical issue. Existing approaches mainly use formal verification, fuzzing, and symbolic execution to analyze contracts. However, the proof complexity of formal verification and the randomness inherent in fuzzing result in high running costs and false negatives. Symbolic execution approaches use lightweight execution semantics for efficiency, but they can lead to false positives and may not adapt to evolving contract semantics. In this paper, we systematically analyze the root causes of 6 types of ECVs by identifying gaps between high-level solidity source code and low-level bytecode and define precise security rules to eliminate these ECVs. We then utilize Hoare-style triples to model the fine-grained execution semantics of contracts. Additionally, we propose a semantics-aware symbolic analysis approach that comprehensively extracts execution semantics to detect ECVs violating security rules, while employing context-aware optimization strategies to reduce the path search space. We implement a fully automated analysis prototype called ECVchecker and evaluate it through empirical testing. The results demonstrate that our approach achieves an average F1-score of 0.97 in detecting ECVs. For contracts with an average bytecode size of 26,612 bytes, our approach can be 1.7x to 6.7x faster than existing approaches.
title_zh: ECVchecker：基于语义感知符号分析的Solidity智能合约外部调用漏洞实用检测方法
abstract_zh: 智能合约之间常常相互调用以实现各种应用，然而非确定性的外部调用会引入漏洞，导致重大资产损失。检查合约外部调用漏洞（ECV）是一个关键问题。现有方法主要采用形式化验证、模糊测试和符号执行来分析合约。然而，形式化验证的证明复杂性以及模糊测试固有的随机性，导致了高运行成本和漏报问题。符号执行方法使用轻量级执行语义以提高效率，但可能引发误报，且难以适应不断演变的合约语义。本文系统性地分析了6类ECV的根本原因，通过识别高级Solidity源代码与低级字节码之间的差异，并定义了精确的安全规则来消除这些ECV。随后，我们利用Hoare风格的三元组对合约的细粒度执行语义进行建模。此外，我们提出了一种语义感知的符号分析方法，全面提取执行语义以检测违反安全规则的ECV，同时采用上下文感知的优化策略来减少路径搜索空间。我们实现了一个全自动分析原型ECVchecker，并通过实证测试进行了评估。结果表明，我们的方法在检测ECV时平均F1分数达到0.97。对于平均字节码大小为26,612字节的合约，我们的方法比现有方法快1.7倍到6.7倍。

title: ViT-Graph: Ransomware Detection via Vision Transformer Classification of Yifan Hu-Visualized Control Flow Graphs
authors: Muhammad Aimaan, Ahmad Firdaus, Muhammad Syafiq, Nur Khairani Kamarudin, Mohd Faizal Ab Razak
publish: 2026 IEEE 2nd International Conference on Robotics and Technologies for Industrial Automation (ROBOTHIA)
abstract: The increasing complexity of ransomware demands a departure from heuristic methods based on static signatures, which are likely to fail when dealing with obfuscated or packed binaries. Existing techniques such as raw binary visualization, capture file statistics but ignore the critical features. In this paper, we propose a new structural detection pipeline to address this gap by transforming the program's inherent behavior into an image-like topology for classification with ViTs. Our approach consists of three stages: (1) the extraction of the Inter-procedural Control Flow Graph (ICFG) from a Portable Executable (PE) file; (2) the graphical representation ICFG using Yifan Hu's Multi-Level force directed layout in order to highlight structural patterns and (3) labeling with our fine-tuned model google/vit-base-patch16-224 on the resulting image. Experimented on a pilot dataset of 2529 Benign and Ransomware samples, the resulting framework attained an Accuracy of 97% that is notably higher than the original Convolutional Neural Network (ResNet-50: 84%, VGG-16: 93%) and Swin Transformers (95%) and graph-based baselines (CGN:50%, ViT-GNN: 93,7). This work shows the effectiveness of translating program logic into the visual domain for robust structure-based ransomware detection, offering a promising direction to combat advanced threats.
title_zh: ViT-Graph：通过视觉Transformer分类基于Yifan Hu可视化的控制流图进行勒索软件检测
abstract_zh: 勒索软件日益复杂的特性要求我们摒弃基于静态签名的启发式方法，因为这类方法在处理混淆或加壳的二进制文件时很可能失效。现有技术（如原始二进制可视化）虽能捕获文件统计信息，却忽略了关键特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的结构检测流程，通过将程序的固有行为转化为类似图像的拓扑结构，并利用Vision Transformer（ViT）进行分类，从而弥补了这一不足。我们的方法包括三个阶段：（1）从可移植可执行（PE）文件中提取过程间控制流图（ICFG）；（2）使用Yifan Hu的多级力导向布局对ICFG进行图形化表示，以突出结构模式；（3）在生成的图像上应用我们微调的模型google/vit-base-patch16-224进行标注。在包含2529个良性样本和勒索软件样本的初步数据集上进行实验，该框架达到了97%的准确率，显著高于原始卷积神经网络（ResNet-50: 84%，VGG-16: 93%）、Swin Transformer（95%）以及基于图的基线方法（CGN: 50%，ViT-GNN: 93.7%）。这项工作展示了将程序逻辑转化为视觉领域对于基于结构的稳健勒索软件检测的有效性，为对抗高级威胁提供了一个有前景的方向。

title: RTL to GDS Implementation of a RISC-V SoC with Integrated Timer using Openlane Framework
authors: Gavaskar K, Shivappriya S N, Ishwerya V, Kanagadharshan V, Elango S, Anbumani V
publish: 2026 8th International Conference on Devices, Circuits, and Systems (ICDCS)
abstract: This paper describes the development and physical execution of a 32-bit RISC-V System-on-Chip (SoC) that incorporates a timer with programming unit utilizing a fully open-source RTL-to-GDSII design pipeline. Due to its open, modular, and license-free nature, the RISC-V architecture has emerged as a viable alternative to proprietary CPU designs. In order to solve these problems, a memory-mapped clock that can produce frequent signals for real-time management is combined with a tiny RISC-V core that supports the RV32I core instruction set. The entire SoC is built with the Open Lane streamlining structure and the Sky130 130 nm CMOS process design kit. Operational validity is tested using cycle-precise simulations, which ensure suitable command processing and dependable interrupt management. Logic synthesis generates an area-saving gate-level architecture translated to Sky130 standard cells. The final GDSII output shows that a fully operational RISC-V SoC can be built with only freeware tools, demonstrating the potential of open hardware design for embedded and industrial applications.
title_zh: 使用Openlane框架的集成定时器RISC-V SoC从RTL到GDS的实现
abstract_zh: 本文阐述了采用完全开源RTL到GDSII设计流程的32位RISC-V片上系统（SoC）的开发与物理实现，该系统集成了带编程单元的定时器。凭借其开放、模块化及免授权特性，RISC-V架构已成为专有CPU设计的可行替代方案。为解决相关问题，本文将一个支持RV32I核心指令集的小型RISC-V内核与一个可产生实时管理所需频繁信号的存储器映射时钟相结合。整个SoC基于Open Lane流片架构与Sky130 130纳米CMOS工艺设计套件构建。通过周期精确仿真验证操作有效性，确保指令处理正确性及中断管理可靠性。逻辑综合生成了映射至Sky130标准单元的节省面积的栅极级架构。最终GDSII输出表明，仅使用免费工具即可构建功能完整的RISC-V SoC，彰显了开源硬件设计在嵌入式及工业应用领域的潜力。

title: Design and Analysis of a 5-Port Router with Enhanced Features for NoC Applications
authors: Ganga Narmada, Subramanya G. Nayak
publish: 2026 International Conference on Smart Futuristic Technology
abstract: With the current generation of System-on-Chip (SoC) designs moving towards having more and more processing cores built into their structures, the demand to have a communication network that can scale up without having to impact timing or predictability has been demanded more and more. Network-on-Chip (NoC) architectures have become a viable option in this sense since they enable parallel transfer of data with reduced interconnect complexity in the whole globe and reduced overall power consumption. The router is at the centre of any NoC, the router controls the movement of flits between nodes and hence contributes significantly to the performance of the network. In this paper, the design and implementation of a five-port QoS-enabled router is proposed in a 2-D mesh NoC. To ensure that traffic with more urgency and that with higher priority than other traffic like real-time data, receives faster access to shared paths when there are conflicts between multiple requests (i.e. not in the same path), the router employs a priority-based arbitration scheme. This assists in addressing latency needs in the busy traffic circumstances. This design is specified in Verilog HDL and its entire design being functionally validated with Cadence Xcelium. In Cadence Genus, synthesis and timing checks are done using typical constraints of SDC. The findings validate proper routing dynamics, one-cycle switching throughput, and significant contention delay reduction in addition to effective utilization of hardware resources. The results of these observations show that the suggested router can be used in performance-sensitive on-chip communication applications in the current SoC platforms.
title_zh: 面向NoC应用的增强型五端口路由器设计与分析
abstract_zh: 随着当前一代片上系统（SoC）设计趋向于在结构中集成越来越多的处理核心，对能够在不影响时序或可预测性的前提下进行扩展的通信网络的需求日益增长。在此背景下，片上网络（NoC）架构已成为一种可行的选择，因为它们能够在全局范围内降低互连复杂度并减少整体功耗，同时实现数据的并行传输。路由器是任何NoC的核心，它控制着流控单元（flits）在节点之间的移动，从而对网络性能产生重大影响。本文提出了一种适用于二维网格NoC的五端口支持服务质量（QoS）的路由器的设计与实现。为确保具有更高紧迫性和优先级（如实时数据）的流量在多个请求发生冲突（即不在同一路径上）时能够更快地访问共享路径，该路由器采用基于优先级的仲裁方案。这有助于在繁忙流量情况下解决延迟需求。该设计采用Verilog HDL描述，并通过Cadence Xcelium对其整体设计进行了功能验证。在Cadence Genus中，使用典型的标准设计约束（SDC）进行了综合和时序检查。结果验证了正确的路由动态、单周期交换吞吐量、显著减少的争用延迟以及硬件资源的有效利用。这些观察结果表明，所提出的路由器可用于当前SoC平台中对性能敏感的片上通信应用。
